name: dsb-adp-punches-sync
description: Pulls clock-in / clock-out punches from ADP Time & Labor (/time/v2/punches) for a date range. Today returns 404 because the Time & Labor API product is not yet provisioned in ADP Marketplace; once enabled the actor automatically starts emitting per-worker punch summaries that the ROLI Lead Pacer uses to replace its absence-inference heuristic with hard truth.
